title: carum multiradiatum
intro: Carum multiradiatum, also known as Ajwain or Trachyspermum ammi, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae and a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its carminative, diuretic, and expectorant effects, which help to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory problems. The health benefits of Carum multiradiatum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and gas, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce stress. Carum multiradiatum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, and can also be consumed as a spice or added to traditional remedies.
